# User Solutions - RMDB Production Planning & Scheduling Software

> Resource Manager DB (RMDB) by User Solutions is a flexible, affordable production planning, scheduling, and tracking software trusted by manufacturers worldwide for over 35 years. EDGEBI is the advanced graphical extension for RMDB.

## Company Information

- **Company Name**: User Solutions, Inc.
- **Founded**: 1991
- **Website**: https://www.usersolutions.com
- **Contact Email**: contact@edgebi.com
- **Industry**: Manufacturing Software / Production Planning

## Core Products

### Resource Manager DB (RMDB)
RMDB is our flagship production planning and scheduling database application. It provides:
- Finite Capacity Planning & Scheduling
- Material Requirements Planning (MRP)
- Inventory Management
- Drag-and-Drop Schedule Adjustments
- What-If Scenario Analysis
- Downtime Analysis and Reporting
- Costing and Estimating
- Advanced Planning and Scheduling (APS)
- Routings and Priority Scheduling
- Purchasing and Receiving
- Excel Integration (import/export)
- Concurrent Resource Scheduling
- Customizable Reports
- Standalone or Networked Operation
- Optional LP Optimization Integration

### EDGEBI (Extension of RMDB)
EDGEBI is the advanced graphical extension bundled with RMDB that adds:
- Interactive Gantt Charts
- Visual Drag-and-Drop Scheduling
- Browser-Based Dashboard Access
- Enhanced Graphical Reporting
- Real-Time Schedule Visualization

### Resource Manager for Excel (RMX)
An Excel-based production planning and scheduling solution for smaller operations or those preferring to work within Excel.

## Key Features & Capabilities

- **Finite Capacity Scheduling**: True finite capacity planning that considers machines, labor, materials, and tools simultaneously
- **MRP Integration**: Full material requirements planning with BOM explosion and lead time calculations
- **ERP Add-On**: Works alongside any ERP system (SAP, Oracle, Epicor, Sage, etc.)
- **Excel Integration**: Deep import/export capabilities with Excel spreadsheets
- **What-If Analysis**: Duplicate schedules and compare different scenarios
- **Drag-and-Drop**: Visual scheduling with real-time constraint checking
- **Fast Implementation**: Days to weeks, not months; works with existing data

## Industries Served

- Discrete Manufacturing
- Batch Processing
- Job Shops
- Make-to-Order Operations
- Make-to-Stock Operations
- Mixed-Mode Manufacturing
- Defense & Aerospace
- Consumer Products
- Food & Beverage
- Electronics
- Medical Devices

## Success Stories

User Solutions has helped manufacturers across industries:
- Repair shops tripled on-time shipping from 30% to 90%
- Job shops gained control of volatile schedules
- Manufacturers replaced complex custom Excel scheduling
- ERP vendors integrated RMDB for flexible scheduling
- US Navy used RMDB for aircraft carrier maintenance scheduling
- Small manufacturers achieved affordable MRP implementation

## Awards & Recognition

- Capterra Shortlist for Production Scheduling Software
- G2 Best Meets Requirements
- Top Performer Software Award
- ERP Leader Recognition
- Named Top ERP Solution by CIO Applications (2016)

## Technical Specifications

- **Platform**: Windows (standalone or networked)
- **Web Access**: EDGEBI provides browser-based visualization
- **Data Import**: Excel (XLS/XLSX), CSV, direct database connections
- **Data Export**: Excel, CSV, PDF reports
- **Database**: Built-in database engine
- **Integration**: REST API, file-based import/export, database connectivity
